Thanks for submitting a PR. Please keep it focused and reviewable.

## Motivation

What existing problem does this pull request solve?

## Summary

What changed in the final diff?

## Test Plan

List the exact commands you ran and the relevant result. Include screenshots or
videos for UI changes.

## Example App Coverage

If this changes product behavior, what example-app scenario or fixture was added
or updated to exercise it?

## Checklist

- [ ] The PR has one coherent intent.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when behavior or setup changed.
- [ ] Tests or example-app coverage were added for new behavior.
- [ ] Formatting, compile, and tests pass locally.
